summary_en: ¥80 per share year-end dividend (¥70 ordinary + ¥10 special). Annual dividend ¥130/share including ¥50 interim. Period end FY3/25 (March 31, 2025). Effective date June 22, 2025. Paid from retained earnings.
translation_en_brief: Applied Co., Ltd. announced a year-end dividend of ¥80 per share for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025. The dividend comprises ¥70 in ordinary dividend and ¥10 in special dividend. Combined with the interim dividend of ¥50 per share already paid, the total annual dividend reaches ¥130 per share. The record date is March 31, 2025, and the payment effective date is June 22, 2025. The dividend will be paid from retained earnings. The company's dividend policy aims to provide stable returns to shareholders based on current business performance.
